recent_projects.name: tof
recent_projects.summary: A simple tool to create time-of-flight chopper cascade diagrams
recent_projects.author: Scipp contributors

recent_projects.name: enhanced-s3-storage-provider
recent_projects.summary: A storage provider which can fetch and store media in Amazon S3.
recent_projects.author: matrix.org team and contributors

recent_projects.name: snmpsim
recent_projects.summary: SNMP Simulator is a tool that acts as multitude of SNMP Agents built into real physical devices, from SNMP Manager's point of view. Simulator builds and uses a database of physical devices' SNMP footprints to respond like their original counterparts do.

recent_projects.name: laboneq
recent_projects.summary: Zurich Instruments LabOne Q software framework for quantum computing control

recent_projects.name: glancewatch
recent_projects.summary: Lightweight monitoring adapter bridging Glances metrics with Uptime Kuma

recent_projects.name: codegen-cli
recent_projects.summary: Command-line coding agent with iterative reasoning, inspired by Claude Code and Cursor CLI, powered by Google Gemini API.

recent_projects.name: odoo-addon-account-dashboard-banner
recent_projects.summary: Add a configurable banner on the accounting dashboard
recent_projects.author: Akretion,Odoo Community Association (OCA)

recent_projects.name: fasthorizon
recent_projects.summary: A Python library for horizon stabilization
recent_projects.author: Your Name
